banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock applicant: Priya Anne Chen, applying for a first-time California REAL ID. She is not an AB 60 licence holder, so she is eligible to continue. She uses her valid U.S. passport as her proof-of-identity document; her current full name matches the name on that passport, so no name-change history or documentation applies. She does not use a P.O. Box, and presents a home utility bill and a bank statement as her two different proofs of California residency. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real applicant's information.

eligibilityOutcome.summary: Eligible to continue the REAL ID application: not an AB 60 driver's licence holder.

reasons.requirement: AB 60 licenses are issued to individuals who cannot provide proof of legal presence in the United States. The source states plainly that AB 60 applicants/renewers are not eligible to receive a REAL ID. If true, the flow ends.
reasons.sourceRef: What Is REAL ID? — 'Individuals applying for or renewing an AB 60 driver's license are not eligible to receive a REAL ID driver's license or identification card.'

collectedValues.label: Are you applying for, or renewing, an AB 60 driver's license?
collectedValues.sourceRef: What Is REAL ID? — 'Individuals applying for or renewing an AB 60 driver's license are not eligible to receive a REAL ID driver's license or identification card.'

collectedValues.sourceRef: Driver's License / ID Card Application (online eDL 44) — 'basic information such as name, address, and date of birth'

collectedValues.label: Social Security number
collectedValues.sourceRef: What Is REAL ID? — 'You will be asked to provide your Social Security number on your REAL ID application (exceptions may apply).'

collectedValues.label: California mailing address — street address
collectedValues.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'BOTH documents must show your first and last name with the same mailing address that is listed on your REAL ID application.'

collectedValues.label: Proof of identity document
collectedValues.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'Proof of Identity ... Check mark the document below that you'll use as your proof of identity.'

collectedValues.label: Does your current full name match what is on your identity document?
collectedValues.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'Does your current full name match what is on your identity document?'

collectedValues.label: Do you use a P.O. Box?
collectedValues.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'Use a P.O. Box? One document MUST show both your P.O. Box and physical (residence) address, and one document may show only the P.O. Box.'

collectedValues.label: First proof-of-residency document
collectedValues.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'Two Proofs of Residency ... Check mark the TWO different documents below that you'll use as your proof of California residency.'

collectedValues.label: Second proof-of-residency document
collectedValues.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'Two Proofs of Residency ... Check mark the TWO different documents below that you'll use as your proof of California residency.'

fieldsNotApplicable.label: Does your valid passport contain your current full name?

fieldsNotApplicable.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'How many times have you changed your full name? ... Please enter a number from 1 to 5.'

documents.label: Proof of identity document
documents.note: identityDocumentType is 'us_passport_or_passport_card'; a valid U.S. passport image was uploaded.
documents.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'Proof of Identity ... This document must include your date of birth and your full name (first, middle, and last).'

documents.label: Legal name change document
documents.note: fullNameMatchesIdentityDocument is true; no name change to document.
documents.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'Ensure you bring at least one of the following to document each legal name change.'

documents.label: First proof-of-residency document
documents.note: residencyDocumentType1 is 'home_utility_or_cellular_phone_bill'; a utility bill image was uploaded.
documents.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'To prove that you live in California, you must present TWO DIFFERENT printed documents that show your California mailing address.'

documents.label: Second proof-of-residency document
documents.note: residencyDocumentType2 is 'bank_or_credit_union_or_credit_card_records'; a bank statement image was uploaded.
documents.sourceRef: REAL ID Checklist — 'To prove that you live in California, you must present TWO DIFFERENT printed documents that show your California mailing address.'

safetyNotice: This packet was assembled by an automated agent from a GovSchema document (us/ca/dmv/real-id-application). GovSchema describes and verifies government processes; it does not submit them. No value in this packet has been transmitted to the California Department of Motor Vehicles or any government system. A human (the applicant) must review every value below, confirm it is correct, bring the original documents to a DMV field office, and explicitly authorize the application through CA DMV's own channel before it is submitted. This packet is not a government record and carries no legal effect on its own.
